name: Possum Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chopped onions in hot fat.
2. Add the finely chopped liver if using.
3. Cook until the liver is tender.
4. Mix in the bread crumbs, red peppers, Worcestershire sauce, and chopped egg.
5. Season with salt to taste.
6. Mix in enough water to moisten the mixture.
7. Stuff the possum with the prepared stuffing.
8. Secure the opening of the possum by skewering or sewing it shut.
Note: Some people recommend parboiling the possum before roasting, removing the skin and fat, or rubbing the possum with sage prior to cooking. Sweet potatoes are often served alongside roasted possum in Southern cuisine.
